events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A girl carrying a backpack entered the elevator, and a man quickly squeezed into the elevator when the elevator closed.
events.event_text: From 2.4s to 8.5s, a girl carrying a backpack entered the elevator, and a man quickly squeezed into the elevator when the elevator closed.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; When the girl arrived at the destination floor and was about to get out of the elevator, the man came forward and forcibly closed the elevator door and hugged the girl from behind.
events.event_text: From 20.7s to 26.3s, when the girl arrived at the destination floor and was about to get out of the elevator, the man came forward and forcibly closed the elevator door and hugged the girl from behind.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The girl rode on the man's back and beat him until the elevator door opened again.
events.event_text: From 27.7s to 39.9s, the girl rode on the man's back and beat him until the elevator door opened again.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The man quickly escaped from the elevator.
events.event_text: From 40.6s to 42.1s, the man quickly escaped from the elevator.
